case_title: 951-957 MISSION STREET ASSOCIATES, L.P VS. MOLINA LOCSIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 951-957 MISSION STREET ASSOCIATES, L.P AS TO DEFENDANT LOCSIN, MOLINA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 951-957 MISSION STREET ASSOCIATES, L.P RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOCSIN, MOLINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 957 MISSION STREET UNIT NUMBER 515, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, **INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT **SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 951-957 MISSION STREET ASSOCIATES, L.P AS TO DEFENDANT LOCSIN, MOLINA
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LOCSIN, MOLINA
